atomic_units.action: Send the employee's bank account details and salary structure to the Finance Team
Verify the employee's bank account details
Contact the employee directly to collect correct bank account information
atomic_units.condition: If the bank account details are incorrect or incomplete

atomic_units.action: Add the employee to the payroll system
Schedule the employee for the next month's payroll cycle
atomic_units.condition: If the employee joins after the 15th of the month

atomic_units.action: Confirm payroll addition to the HR Business Partner within two business days of receiving the bank details
